results.engine_gap: planeswalker loyalty abilities not driven by interceptors yet
results.notes: Existing comment retained; planeswalker activation framework absent.

results.engine_gap: blight-1 + sacrifice-self activated exile not wired
results.notes: Wired the static 'enchanted creature can't attack or block' clause via a custom PREVENT interceptor on ATTACK_DECLARED for obj.state.attached_to plus make_cant_block with a filter matching the attached creature.

results.engine_gap: activated tap+tap-another-creature cost; targeted tap effect on opponent creature
results.notes: make_tap_trigger would fire on attack-tap, granting a free targeted tap every attack; cleanly leaving as engine gap until activation system is wired.

results.engine_gap: 'cast as though it had flash' if controller has a Faerie
results.notes: Wired hexproof-while-untapped via make_keyword_grant with a filter that matches self when state.tapped is False. Filter is evaluated each QUERY_ABILITIES, so tapping the creature drops hexproof dynamically.

results.engine_gap: as-enters chosen-type tracking; tap-charge counter trigger; spell-copy delayed trigger
results.notes: Existing comment retained; full spell-copy machinery missing.

results.engine_gap: behold (additional exile cost) + linked LtB return; activated blight target-opponent
results.notes: Existing comment retained; behold mechanic and exile-LtB linkage are engine gaps.

results.engine_gap: two distinct {T} activated abilities (blight 1 + surveil 1; blight 2 + targeted graveyard exile); cast-from-exile permission with -1/-1 counter cost
results.notes: Cannot wire either tap ability cleanly because the engine cannot distinguish between the two activations on a single TAP event.
Custom keyword counter zone tracking is an engine gap.

results.engine_gap: tap+blight activated cost; conditional 'if you discarded, draw'
results.notes: Pure activated ability with multi-cost; no clean attach point.

results.engine_gap: behold cost + activated trample EOT + nth-resolution counter mana
results.notes: Behold mechanic + activation counting is engine gap.

results.engine_gap: activated {1}{R}{T}+blight cost; deals 2 damage to each opponent
results.notes: Wiring as tap_trigger would deal 2 damage to each opponent on every attack-tap, a major over-application.

results.engine_gap: 'can't be blocked by more than one creature' restriction; activated targeted +2/+2 EOT for {5}
results.notes: Both abilities require engine support not yet present.
tap_trigger would fire on attack-tap; sorcery-speed gating is also missing.

results.engine_gap: activated {1}{W}{T} keyword-grant; end-step life-gain conditional cascade with cast-without-paying
results.notes: End-step trigger could be partially wired (gained-life-this-turn check) but the cast-from-library cascade is gap.

results.engine_gap: activated 'tap two untapped creatures' cost; copy target triggered ability with new-target choice
results.notes: Tap-N-creature costs and triggered-ability copying are engine gaps.

results.engine_gap: hexproof-from-each-of-its-colors static; activated 'becomes all colors' EOT
results.notes: Per-color hexproof and color-overwrite EOT are engine gaps.

results.engine_gap: as-enters chosen-type tracking; chosen-type ETB life-gain trigger; activated GY-to-hand sacrifice
first-token-creation-each-turn replacement effect substituting copies of equipped creature; equipment system
results.notes: Token-creation replacement and equipment attachment are engine gaps.
